name: penrush
description: Marketplace for PenRUSH — a pre-install supply-chain gate for Claude Code that gates dependency installs on a publication-age cool-down before they run.

plugins.name: penrush
plugins.description: Pre-install supply-chain gate — don't rush to download. Gates npm/PyPI/cargo/RubyGems/Go/GitHub/Docker/MCP installs on a publication-age cool-down before Claude runs them.
